ticket_description: Refactor the AI layer to support multiple LLM providers (Gemini, Groq, Ollama) via environment variables using a unified interface.

fixes_applied: Created unified provider factory (src/lib/core/ai.ts) with Gemini, Groq, Ollama support
Implemented automatic fallback chain: Gemini -> Groq -> Ollama
Refactored ai-writer.ts from raw fetch() calls to Vercel AI SDK generateObject with Zod schema validation
Updated chat API route to use unified getAIModel factory instead of hardcoded useOllama flag
Rewrote unit tests to mock the new Vercel AI SDK layer
Removed dead import of OLLAMA_DEFAULT_BASE_URL/OLLAMA_DEFAULT_MODEL from route.ts
dead_code_identified: GEMINI_FALLBACK_MODELS in src/lib/core/constants.ts is now unused - safe to remove in follow-up

expected_output.security_audit: No hardcoded keys, no PII in logs, rate limiting intact
